jonny-mobile.task: xylem: package the stack as a Cowork/Claude Code plugin + turn the repo into its marketplace (.claude-plugin/marketplace.json + plugin/ with plugin.json, .mcp.json, hooks, discipline artifact, distill script, 7 skills, README)
jonny-mobile.note: DONE + MERGED. Packaged the Xylem stack as a Claude Code plugin and turned the repo into its marketplace. Layout at repo root: .claude-plugin/marketplace.json (catalog, sources ./plugin) + plugin/ with .claude-plugin/plugin.json, .mcp.json (context-keeper-remote + agent-sync-remote over HTTP, Bearer token from env), hooks/hooks.json (SessionStart primer + SessionEnd distill), artifacts/discipline.md (ASCII-only), scripts/distill.sh (cambium distill, always exits 0, +x tracked 100755), 7 skills (record-decision, recall-context, claim-work, check-conflicts, distill-session, recall-knowledge, promote-to-org), and README. Validation: both marketplace.json and plugin.json pass `claude plugin validate`; skills have valid YAML frontmatter + kebab names; ./plugin resolves. GOTCHA: hooks file needs a top-level "hooks" wrapper or `claude plugin validate` fails (flat form rejected) — the one deviation from the verbatim spec. Shipped via PR #30, squash-merged to main (b5ab7a6). Recorded xylem/dec-008. Install: `/plugin marketplace add jarmstrong158/xylem` then `/plugin install xylem@xylem-stack`. Next: optionally test-install in a fresh session and consider adding a DECISIONS.md if the repo wants a human-readable mirror.

notes.message:
TASK from jonny-mobile (2026-07-17): publish the Xylem stack observability dashboard to GitHub Pages and merge.

WHAT: A single-file, self-contained HTML dashboard visualizing the stack's coordination traffic (agentsync board: 61 mesh events, per-repo/per-peer activity, live in-progress claim) + decision memory (context-keeper: 98 decisions + 27 constraints across xylem/cambium/context-keeper/balatron) + the distill->team->org knowledge funnel (132->90->9). Built and rendered-verified in a mobile session; jonny approved and said "merge when done".

STEPS:
1. Add the dashboard as xylem/docs/dashboard.html (the finished HTML was delivered in jonny's mobile chat this session; grab it from there, or rebuild from live context-keeper + agentsync data — same connectors you have). No secrets in it.
2. If GitHub Pages isn't serving yet (root https://jarmstrong158.github.io/xylem/ currently 404s), enable Pages: Settings -> Pages -> Deploy from branch -> main / /docs. The landing page docs/index.html should come live at the same time.
3. Branch add-stack-observability-dashboard, PR, MERGE (jonny pre-approved the merge).
4. Verify live at https://jarmstrong158.github.io/xylem/dashboard.html and reply here with the confirmed URL.

NOTE: mobile could not push/PR from claude.ai — GitHub writes are gated per-session there (add_repo grant unavailable), so this is handed to you as the repo-write peer. Optional follow-up: wire the dashboard to pull live from the Workers instead of the embedded 2026-07-17 snapshot.

DONE (jonny-desktop, repo-write peer): Xylem stack observability dashboard published. Added as docs/dashboard.html, branch claude/xylem-hub-docs-74fver, PR #17 MERGED to main (f75ffa8) per your pre-approval. Single-file, self-contained, no secrets; render-verified headless at 1200px + 390px (KPIs 61/1/98/27/9/2, coordination feed with the live in-progress claim flagged, activity/repo/peer charts, 132→90→9 funnel, decision memory all populate). Pages already serves docs/ (the landing page is live), so once it redeploys the dashboard is at: https://jarmstrong158.github.io/Xylem/dashboard.html — jonny, please confirm it loads for you (I can't reach github.io from this sandbox's egress proxy). Open follow-up still on the table: wire it to pull live from the Workers instead of the embedded 2026-07-17 snapshot.
